title: Ancol Fluffy Chicks Cat Toys Infused With Catnip Crinkle Soft Cat Kitten Toys (Pack of two)
features: SOFT AND LIGHT AND PERFECT FOR BATTING ABOUT
description: Product Description Ancol Fluffy Chicks ( set of two, one yellow and one blue) are the perfect toy for inquisitive and playful cats. The various textures make for an exciting playtime, while the catnip inside promotes happiness and relaxation. For your pet's safety, examine the item from time to time for wear and tear and replace if necessary. Toy measures 15cm length. Directions Supervise play
